rext.code_of_record: rosetta-extensions @ main (M223 seeders: 4th story + HiringConfigSeeder + HiringFunnelSeeder + reset/closure/isolation wiring)
rext.tag: DEFERRED — rext tag cut when M224 first consumes the hiring seed on a stack (per the M222/M223 registration convention)
rext.touched_module: stack-seeding (seeders/hiring_config.go, seeders/hiring_funnel.go, presets/stories.seed.yaml 4th story, contentref hiring reader)

tests.full_suite: 13 stack-seeding packages GREEN (-count=1), gofmt + go vet clean
tests.flake_gate: 5/5 random-order (-shuffle=on) on the seeders pkg — 0 flakes
tests.load_bearing_fence: TestHiringFunnelSeeder_WritesMirrorPair — RED-provable (disabling the local_jobsimulation_sessions mirror write fails it with the M219-trap message)

deliverables.fourth_story: Meridian Talent (narrative: hiring, is_hiring: true, HiringOrgID(), 5 admin + 45 candidate, heroless — M224 seats)
deliverables.hiring_config_seeder: 5 shared real SIMULATION_TYPE_HIRING sims via the type-aware readHiringSimPool, reserved DISJOINT in the tail (M219 R-3), written as organization_sim_invitation_links
deliverables.hiring_funnel_seeder: each candidate a scored HIRING session MIRROR PAIR (jobsimulation.sessions + public.local_jobsimulation_sessions — the score source); measured 43-on-all-5 + 2 assigned-only (215 pairs), scores [27,100] / 68 distinct (rankable spread, not flat), 0 junk (0 skill refs -> closure trivially green)
deliverables.wiring: hiring rows in resetTables (child-first) + closure gate + isolation audit

done_fate1: S2 config seeder + reader + disjoint reservation
confirmed_covered_fate2: render proof + cockpit heroes + Clerkenstein isHiring -> M224
annotated_fate3: job_position replay drop -> M223 overview (the M222 BA-6 refinement)

notes: The recruiter candidate-comparison funnel. The single load-bearing risk (the M219 mirror-table trap) is fenced RED-provable. Scores are a differentiated spread (rankable), closure stays green (0 skill refs). The starved-pool adversarial scenario is handled by M222's measured-87 + the M224 render gate (decisions.md, 2026-07-16). Close driven inline after two close-agent stalls; every gate re-run by hand.
